clusters.justification: This domain encompasses broad macroscopic interoceptive and emotional processes, representing the coordinated activity of salience and limbic networks underlying valence, arousal, and systemic responses to stimuli.

These terms share co-activation within distributed striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitries, representing a macro-level system for computing subjective value, incentive salience, and reinforcement-based choice.

This domain reflects the high-level functional specialization of the default mode network for internally directed, associative conceptual processing that bridges self-referential thought with the perception and understanding of others.
